articles.title: Feds move to dismiss charges against officers accused of falsifying warrant in Breonna Taylor raid
articles.description:

This dismissal may affect ongoing discussions about police accountability in Boston.

articles.title: White House urges Congress to take a light touch on AI regulations in new legislative blueprint

articles.title: DEA names Colombian president ‘priority target’ as US prosecutors probe ties to drug traffickers
articles.description:

summary: DEA labels Colombian President Gustavo Petro a 'priority target' in drug trafficking investigation.
